translated: You listen carefully to what you say to the people here, those days that have passed; and we say now these future days that are important.

ref: You may be sure a servant who is always faithful will be put in charge of everything the master owns.
text: Yɛlimaŋni ka n siri yɛtti ya, ni, u nin ti zaŋŋi u bunseelli kam fukumsi n‑niŋi lala daabri nuu ni.
translated: The people here say that I always hear them tell you, now come to do your task well and carry my load on your shoulders.

ref: Then they sat down to guard him.
text: Di nyaaŋŋa ba daa zinni bɛni ka gɔsiri u ni.
translated: They say in the house that people see him there.
